reviews.comment:
Hay que hacer fila sobre la avenida , y en mi caso no vi la fila , entre a cargar y el playero de muy mala manera me dijo que había que hacer la fila, mala antencion

(Translated by Google)
You have to queue on the avenue, and in my case I didn't see the queue, I went in to load and the beach attendant very rudely told me that I had to queue, poor service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHcFByX2F3EAE

reviews.comment:
Es la única YPF en todo Miramar, cómo puede ser que siempre, solo hay un playero, es una vergüenza lo que hacen con el cliente, sin contar las veces que están sin sistema.

(Translated by Google)
It's the only YPF in all of Miramar, how can it be that there's always only one attendant? It's a disgrace what they do to the customer, not to mention the times their system is down.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHbjZiN2R3EAE

reviews.comment:
Bueno..bajo la calificación.
Motivos:La empresa pone un sólo empleado, se forman colas hasta de 100mts,ellos cuentan con que no tenemos muchos lugares para elegir,un desastre,la empresa sabe que las ventas son las mismas y explotan a full a un sólo playero que la verdad atiende de primera,pero nos condenan a perder tiempo.
EMPRESARIOS DE CUARTA,LA CULPA NO ES DEL GOBIERNO ☝Estuve leyendo opiniones..claro los cliente califican la buena atención del personal .

(Translated by Google)
Well...low rating.
Reasons: The company only has one employee, lines form up to 100 meters long, they count on us not having many options, it's a disaster. The company knows sales are the same and they're exploiting a single attendant who, to be honest, provides excellent service, but they're condemning us to waste time.
FOURTH-RATE BUSINESS OWNERS, IT'S NOT THE GOVERNMENT'S FAULT ☝ I was reading reviews...of course, customers rate the staff's service as good.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1752873787390207331/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNpMWZMWGN3EAE
